text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Arima Kinen fast approaching, Special
Week summons Grass Wonder to one of the
academy's rooftops.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's there that Special Week declares her
intentions to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder accepts the challenge, assuring her
rival that she won't hold anything back either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Many rivals have accompanied her along this path
she walks, and the challenge ahead will surely
allow her to make another great leap of progress.
